layoutRoles.name: pageShell
layoutRoles.definition: Top-level page structure containing header, main, footer, overlays, or sticky regions.

layoutRoles.name: sectionBand
layoutRoles.definition: Full-width horizontal page section with a distinct structural purpose.

layoutRoles.name: contentGrid
layoutRoles.definition: Repeated item layout for cards, features, services, products, or proof.

layoutRoles.name: splitPane
layoutRoles.definition: Two-region layout where primary content and supporting content remain related.

layoutRoles.name: stickyRegion
layoutRoles.definition: Persistent region such as sticky header, sticky footer bar, or mobile CTA.

layoutRoles.name: overlaySurface
layoutRoles.definition: Dialog, drawer, popover, or toast surface shown above the page.

layoutRoles.name: formGroup
layoutRoles.definition: Grouped labels, inputs, helper text, validation, and submit/recovery actions.
